note: Koine Studio is a Preact app. This sync ships LIVE React-mountable components (the real Studio panels, exposed on window.KoineStudio via a thin Preact→React adapter) PLUS the design tokens. Off the design-sync converter's happy path; hand-built via .ds-adapter/. See NOTES.md for the adapter mechanism, rebuild recipe, and re-sync risks.

build.installAdapter: cd .ds-adapter && npm i && npx playwright install chromium
